rss.title: World News in Brief: Ukraine drone attacks, Afghan rights, Zero-Waste Day
rss.snippet: A night of drone attacks reportedly killed two people and injured 12 in the Ukrainian port city of Odesa, as a maternity hospital and three educational facilities were also damaged.

rss.title: MIDDLE EAST LIVE 30 March: UN peacekeepers killed amid Israel-Hezbollah clashes
rss.snippet: Further attacks have been reported across the Middle East as the war enters a second month, with two more Indonesian peacekeepers killed in Southern Lebanon on Monday, following the death of a fellow ‘blue helmet’ a day earlier. rss.title: Syria: UN Commission documents grave violations in July 2025 escalation in Sweida
rss.snippet: More than 1,700 people were killed and nearly 200,000 more displaced in the July 2025 massacres in Sweida, Syria, UN human rights investigators said on Friday in a report that called for greater action towards accountability.

arxiv_papers.title: Can AI mediation improve democratic deliberation?
arxiv_papers.snippet: The strength of democracy lies in the free and equal exchange of diverse viewpoints.
